<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Application health"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/actuator/health"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns liveness and readiness status including the status of downstream
dependencies (database, Kafka, disk space). Suitable for load-balancer
health checks.


<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./health-check.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
